inst✝² : Monad m

inst✝ : MonadRef m
h :
  (fun str => do
      let s ←
        do
          let info ← MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos
          let scp ← getCurrMacroScope
          let quotCtx ← MonadQuotation.getContext
          pure
              {
                raw :=
                  Syntax.node2 info `Lean.Parser.Term.app
                    (Syntax.ident info "a".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `a scp) [])
                    (Syntax.node3 info `null (Syntax.ident info "b".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `b scp) [])
                      (Syntax.ident info "c".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `c scp) [])
                      (Syntax.node3 info `«term#[_,]» (Syntax.atom info "#[")
                        (Syntax.node5 info `null
                          (Syntax.ident info "x".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `x scp) [])
                          (Syntax.atom info ",") (quote `term str).raw (Syntax.atom info ",")
                          (Syntax.ident info "z".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `z scp) []))
                        (Syntax.atom info "]"))) }
      pure s.raw) =
    fun x => pure Syntax.missing
g : String → m Syntax :=
  fun str => do
    let s ←
      do
        let info ← MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos
        let scp ← getCurrMacroScope
        let quotCtx ← MonadQuotation.getContext
        pure
            {
              raw :=
                Syntax.node2 info `Lean.Parser.Term.app
                  (Syntax.ident info "a".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `a scp) [])
                  (Syntax.node3 info `null (Syntax.ident info "b".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `b scp) [])
                    (Syntax.ident info "c".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `c scp) [])
                    (Syntax.node3 info `«term#[_,]» (Syntax.atom info "#[")
                      (Syntax.node5 info `null (Syntax.ident info "x".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `x scp) [])
                        (Syntax.atom info ",") (quote `term str).raw (Syntax.atom info ",")
                        (Syntax.ident info "z".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `z scp) []))
                      (Syntax.atom info "]"))) }
    pure s.raw
this : g "hello" ≠ pure Syntax.missing
⊢ False

      apply congr_arg .raw

    simp [g] at h₃

    <;> try contradiction
    <;> try simp_all [m]
    <;> try simp_all [Syntax.node2]

  let h₂ : g "hello" = pure .missing := by

    simp [g] at h₃ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [Quoting.quote]
    <;> try contradiction

    <;> try simp_all [Quoting.getContext]
    <;> try simp_all [MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos]
  -- Derive a contradiction from h₁ and h₂
  have h₃ : False := by
    apply h₁
    exact h₂
  exact h₃

simp [h₂]
          have h₃ : grow n (grow (n + 1) x) = grow (n + 1) x := by
            have h₄ : grow (n + 1) x = x := by
              have h₅ : n + 1 < n + 2 := by linarith
              have h₆ : grow (n + 1) x = x := (ih (n + 1) (by linarith)) x
              exact h₆
            have h₅ : grow n (grow (n + 1) x) = grow n x := by rw [h₄]
            have h₆ : grow n x = x := (ih n (by linarith)) x
            rw [h₅, h₆]
          simp_all [h₃]
          <;>
          (try simp_all) <;>
          (try aesop) <;>
          (try omega)
    exact h₁ n x
  simp [h]

        do
          let info ← MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos
          let scp ← getCurrMacroScope
          let quotCtx ← MonadQuotation.getContext

                    (Syntax.node3 info `null (Syntax.ident info "b".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `b scp) [])
                      (Syntax.ident info "c".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `c scp) [])

                          (Syntax.ident info "x".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `x scp) [])
                          (Syntax.atom info ",") (quote `term str).raw (Syntax.atom info ",")
                          (Syntax.ident info "z".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `z scp) []))
                        (Syntax.atom info "]"))) }
      pure s.raw) "hello" = (fun x => pure Syntax.missing) "hello" := by
    rw [h₁]
  have h₃ : (fun str => do
      let s ←
        do
          let info ← MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos
          let scp ← getCurrMacroScope
          let quotCtx ← MonadQuotation.getContext
          pure
              {
                raw :=
                  Syntax.node2 info `Lean.Parser.Term.app
                    (Syntax.ident info "a".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `a scp) [])
                    (Syntax.node3 info `null (Syntax.ident info "b".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `b scp) [])
                      (Syntax.ident info "c".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `c scp) [])

                          (Syntax.atom info ",") (quote `term str).raw (Syntax.atom info ",")

      pure s.raw) "hello" ≠ (fun x => pure Syntax.missing) "hello" := by

    intro h₄
    have h₅ : (do
        let info ← MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos
        let scp ← getCurrMacroScope
        let quotCtx ← MonadQuotation.getContext
        let s : Syntax :=
          {

              Syntax.node2 info `Lean.Parser.Term.app

                (Syntax.node3 info `null (Syntax.ident info "b".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `b scp) [])
                  (Syntax.ident info "c".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `c scp) [])

                    (Syntax.atm info "]")))

        pure s.raw) = Syntax.missing := by
      simpa [h₄] using h₄
    have h₆ : (do
        let info ← MonadRef.mkInfoFromRefPos
        let scp ← getCurrMacroScope
        let quotCtx ← MonadQuotation.getContext
        let s : Syntax :=
          {
            raw :=
              Syntax.node2 info `Lean.Parser.Term.app
                (Syntax.iden info "a".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `a scp) [])
                (Syntax.nod3 info `null (Syntax.iden info "b".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `b scp) [])
                  (Syntax.iden info "c".toRawSubstring' (addMacroScope quotCtx `c scp) [])

                    (Syntax.atm info "]")))

        pure s.raw) ≠ Syntax.missing := by
      dsimp
      intro h₇
      -- Since the syntax is complex, we can assert it's not missing as it contains several elements.

      simp_all [Syntax.missing]
      <;>

      <;>

      <;>
